page.content: In the context of Sony Group's Media & Entertainment report for December 2023, the Licensing and Syndication revenue details indicate that under the LicenseType header, OriginalContent generated revenue of £15M from TVShows and £10M from Movies, totaling £25M with a growth rate of 5%, primarily in the UK, which contributed £15M from TVShows, £5M from Movies, leading to a total of £20M.

lines.text: In the context of Sony Group's Media & Entertainment report for December 2023, the Licensing and Syndication revenue
details indicate that under the LicenseType header, OriginalContent generated revenue of £15M from TVShows and £10M from
Movies, totaling £25M with a growth rate of 5%, primarily in the UK, which contributed £15M from TVShows, £5M from
Movies, leading to a total of £20M.

page.content: SyndicatedContent, on the other hand, accrued £20M from TVShows and £12M from Movies, culminating in a total of £32M, reflecting a growth rate of 3%, with France contributing £10M from TVShows and £8M from Movies, resulting in a total revenue of £18M. The TotalRevenue row shows a combined figure of £45M from TVShows and £30M from Movies, equating to £75M, with a growth rate of 4%, while Germany accounted for £10M from TVShows and £7M from Movies, aggregating to £17M.

page.content: In the Streaming Revenue and Royalty Payments table, the metrics reveal a TotalRevenue of £150M and NetIncome of £45M, with a growth rate of 200M; other entries include £30M in Streaming Revenue with a 15% growth rate and £5M Net Income, £100M in Streaming Revenue with £20M Net Income and a 10% growth rate, £75M in Streaming Revenue with £22M Net Income and a 12% growth rate, £50M in Streaming Revenue yielding £15M Net Income and an 8% growth rate, culminating in a Total of £200M in Streaming Revenue and £60M in Net Income.

lines.text: In the Streaming Revenue and Royalty Payments table, the metrics reveal a TotalRevenue of £150M and NetIncome of £45M,
with a growth rate of 200M; other entries include £30M in Streaming Revenue with a 15% growth rate and £5M Net Income,
£100M in Streaming Revenue with £20M Net Income and a 10% growth rate, £75M in Streaming Revenue with £22M Net
Income and a 12% growth rate, £50M in Streaming Revenue yielding £15M Net Income and an 8% growth rate, culminating in
a Total of £200M in Streaming Revenue and £60M in Net Income.
